data.title: Cook County Treasurer Maria Pappas recognizes Assyrian New Year by honoring civic, business and community leaders
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Chicago, Maria Pappas is set to lead an event acknowledging the Assyrian New Year 6776. The celebration aims to commend prominent figures in the civic, business, and community sectors for their remarkable impact on the Chicagoland region. Scheduled from 4:00 p.m. to 6:00 p.m., the event will highlight the achievements of leaders and their contributions to the community.

data.title: Tether exec takes charge of pro-crypto PAC before US midterms. Stablecoin yield debate heats up in Congress. #cryptonews
data.description: In the United States government, there is currently a discussion surrounding stablecoin yield that is expected to have implications for Tether and other similar digital assets. This debate is part of the deliberation on a market structure bill by lawmakers. The outcome of these discussions could have significant consequences for the cryptocurrency market and its participants.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Await Trump's Iran War Speech; Tesla Set To Reclaim EV Crown
data.description: At 9 p.m. ET, President Donald Trump is scheduled to address the nation regarding the Iran war. Tesla is expected to make deliveries early Thursday. Dow Jones Futures are eagerly anticipating Trump's speech on Iran as Tesla aims to regain its position as the leading electric vehicle manufacturer.
Rezaei, a military adviser to Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei: Iran would not stop the war until it secures what he described as its rights and deters its enemies.

data.title: The Fundrise Innovation Fund (VCX) Participates in OpenAI's $122 Billion Funding Round
data.description: The Fundrise Innovation Fund (VCX) has confirmed its involvement in OpenAI's recent funding round, further solidifying its investment in the prominent tech company. OpenAI has successfully secured $122 billion in committed capital, valuing the company at $852 billion following the funding. This marks one of the most substantial private financing rounds to date. Amazon played a significant role in this round by contributing $50 billion towards the total amount raised.

data.title: Medalist Diversified, Inc. Announces Dividend of $0.0675 Per Share on Its Common Stock
data.description: Medalist Diversified, Inc., a sponsor of Delaware Statutory Trusts, based in Virginia, revealed that its Board of Directors has approved and the Company has announced a quarterly dividend for its common stock (NASDAQ: MDRR). The declared dividend is set at $0.0675 per share, and it will be distributed in cash on April 21, 2026, to shareholders listed on the record for the common stock as of April 15, 2026.

data.title: Imperial Capital Launches Northridge Infrastructure Solutions
data.description: A new platform, Northridge Infrastructure Solutions, has been launched by Imperial Capital Group Ltd. in Toronto on April 1, 2026. This platform is dedicated to servicing utilities' critical transmission and distribution infrastructure. This initiative aims to address the growing need for specialized services in this sector. The platform is set to provide essential support to maintenance and operation of crucial infrastructure. Imperial Capital Group Ltd. is optimistic about the impact of Northridge Infrastructure Solutions in meeting the increasing demands of utilities.

data.title: Calamos Investments Closed-End Funds (NASDAQ: CHI, CHY, CSQ, CGO, CHW, CCD and CPZ) Announce Monthly Distributions and Required Notifications of Sources of Distribution
data.description: In April 2026, Calamos Investments® revealed details about the monthly distributions and sources of payments for its seven closed-end funds in Metro Chicago. Shareholders will receive payments as per the funds' distribution plans. The specific fund distribution payable was not disclosed in the provided information.

data.title: Ready Capital Corp reports recent business developments, keeping investors informed.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, the lowest it has been in three years. This decrease represents a significant improvement from the previous rate of 5.8% just six months ago. The report also highlighted that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last quarter, indicating a strong growth trend. Additionally, the average hourly wage has increased by 3.5% compared to last year, reaching $25.50. Experts believe that these positive indicators suggest a healthy and thriving economy with promising prospects for the future.

data.title: Granite Wins $114M Award for Next Segment of Highway 101 Project
data.description: Granite (NYSE:GVA) has secured the Segment 4E North of the Highway 101 Carpinteria to Santa Barbara Construction Manager/General Contractor (CM/GC) project, valued at around $114 million, as announced in Watsonville, Calif. The company, serving as the construction manager for the entire phase 4 project, had previously been granted Segment 4E South back in 2024. The Carpinteria to Santa Barbara CM/GC initiative is part of a significant, long-term effort by Caltrans to enhance safety and alleviate traffic congestion in the area.

data.title: Principal Real Estate Income Fund Declares Monthly Distributions of $0.105 Per Share
data.description: In Denver, the Principal Real Estate Income Fund, listed on NYSE as "PGZ," has declared monthly distributions of $0.105 per common share. With a current net asset value share price of $10.98 as of March 26, 2026, this equates to an annualized distribution rate of 11.48%. The specified distribution dates are as follows: Ex Date.

data.title: Connection Recognized as a 2026 Dell Technologies Titanium Black Partner
data.description: Based in Merrimack, New Hampshire, Connection (NASDAQ: CNXN) is a prominent provider of IT solutions to various sectors. They recently attained the prestigious Dell Technologies Partner Program Titanium Black status for 2026, which is the program's highest level. This achievement highlights Connection as one of Dell's top strategic partners capable of offering cutting-edge technology solutions.

data.title: BJ’s Wholesale Club Names Stephanie Reibling Executive Vice President, Chief Merchandising Officer
data.description: BJ’s Wholesale Club revealed the appointment of Stephanie Reibling as the new Executive Vice President and Chief Merchandising Officer. The move, effective immediately, sees Reibling taking charge of the company’s merchandising division to enhance growth in various product categories. She will report to Paul Cichocki, the EVP and Chief Commercial Officer. This decision reflects BJ’s focus on strengthening its merchandising strategies under Reibling's leadership.

data.title: MaxLinear, Inc. Announces Conference Call to Review First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: MaxLinear, based in Carlsbad, California, will be holding an earnings conference call on Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 1:30pm PDT/4:30pm EDT. This call is scheduled to discuss the company's financial results and performance for the upcoming period. Investors and stakeholders are encouraged to participate in this important call to stay informed about MaxLinear's progress.

data.title: Chesapeake Utilities Announces Appointment of Chief Transformation Officer and Chief Accounting Officer
data.description: Chesapeake Utilities Corporation (NYSE: CPK) made public in Dover, Del., on April 1, 2026, about two new leadership appointments that highlight the Company's dedication to operational quality and sustained expansion. Starting from April 1, a senior vice president along with the chief accounting officer...

data.title: Regional Natural Gas Storage Helped Southern Californians Avoid Over $120 Million In Energy Costs During Winter Storm Fern
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Los Angeles, the Southern California Gas Company (SoCalGas) has collaborated with state officials and regulators to improve natural gas storage capability. This is crucial for strengthening energy system resilience over the past few years. The company has invested significant resources in this effort, with an emphasis on staying prepared for potential energy crises.

data.title: iAutomation Expands Automation Solutions with Festo Across the Mid-Atlantic and Southeast
data.description: iAutomation is pleased to share that they are now authorized to provide expanded automation solutions and local expertise to customers in the Mid-Atlantic and Southeast regions. Based in Franklin, Massachusetts, the company announced this update on April 1, 2026. iAutomation, known for offering top-notch industrial automation solutions, aims to serve a larger customer base with this development.

data.title: HERITAGE NOLA BANCORP, INC. ANNOUNCES COMPLETION OF PURCHASE AND ASSUMPTION TRANSACTION BETWEEN HERITAGE BANK OF ST. TAMMANY AND ONPATH FEDERAL CREDIT UNION
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Covington, Louisiana, Heritage Nola Bancorp, Inc. (also known as Heritage NOLA Bancorp) revealed that they are the holding company for Heritage Bank of St. Tammany. The company's stock is listed as OTC Pink under the symbol HRGG. They joined hands with OnPath Federal Credit Union. This collaboration began on April 1, 2026, aiming to enhance their services and offerings.
